requirement_topic.en: Dubai Civil Defence Fire-Safety and Installation Review
requirement_topic.zh: 迪拜民防消防安全与安装审查
requirement_topic.zht: 杜拜民防消防安全與安裝審查

summary.en: BESS installed in Dubai can trigger Dubai Civil Defence plan review, installation approval, inspection, and fire-protection expectations for the specific site. A practical file normally includes layout drawings, separation distances, ventilation or gas-management rationale, thermal-runaway mitigation, detection, suppression, emergency shutdown, signage, commissioning evidence, and emergency procedures. NFPA 855-style energy-storage installation review may be requested by project owners, insurers, or reviewers, but the exact UAE legal route must be confirmed with the authority having jurisdiction.
summary.zh: 在迪拜安装的BESS可能触发迪拜民防针对具体场址的图纸审查、安装批准、检查及消防保护要求。实务文件通常包括布置图、安全距离、通风或气体管理依据、热失控缓解、探测、灭火、紧急停机、标识、调试证据和应急程序。项目业主、保险方或审查方可能要求采用类似NFPA 855的储能安装审查，但具体阿联酋法律路径必须向有管辖权的主管机关确认。
summary.zht: 在杜拜安裝的BESS可能觸發杜拜民防針對具體場址的圖紙審查、安裝批准、檢查及消防保護要求。實務文件通常包括佈置圖、安全距離、通風或氣體管理依據、熱失控緩解、探測、滅火、緊急停機、標識、調試證據和應急程序。項目業主、保險方或審查方可能要求採用類似NFPA 855的儲能安裝審查，但具體阿聯酋法律路徑必須向有管轄權的主管機關確認。

standards_or_laws: Dubai Civil Defence engineering plans, inspection, and fire-safety approval process
UAE Fire and Life Safety Code of Practice as applied by civil-defence authorities
NFPA 855-style review where requested by project, insurer, or authority

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558, and project fire-review documentation for electrochemical energy storage. These documents may support a UAE technical package but do not replace Dubai Civil Defence or other emirate civil-defence approval for the installation.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558及项目消防审查文件管理电化学储能。这些文件可支持阿联酋技术资料包，但不能替代迪拜民防或其他酋长国民防对安装的批准。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558及項目消防審查文件管理電化學儲能。這些文件可支持阿聯酋技術資料包，但不能替代杜拜民防或其他酋長國民防對安裝的批准。

gap.en: A component conformity certificate or battery safety test report does not close the UAE site fire-safety gap. Exporters should prepare civil-defence-ready installation documentation and confirm whether the project is in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, or another emirate because the authority having jurisdiction and submission process can differ.
gap.zh: 组件合格证书或电池安全测试报告不能覆盖阿联酋现场消防安全差距。出口商应准备可提交民防审查的安装文件，并确认项目位于迪拜、阿布扎比或其他酋长国，因为有管辖权的主管机关和提交流程可能不同。
gap.zht: 組件合格證書或電池安全測試報告不能覆蓋阿聯酋現場消防安全差距。出口商應準備可提交民防審查的安裝文件，並確認項目位於杜拜、阿布扎比或其他酋長國，因為有管轄權的主管機關和提交流程可能不同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where civil-defence plan review, installation approval, or inspection applies to the site; NFPA 855-style evidence may be authority, insurer, owner, or project specified
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, local fire review, and applicable GB standard status

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UAE BESS fire safety is site-specific. Plan for civil-defence installation review and a fire-safety evidence package instead of relying only on battery, IEC, GB, or conformity certificates.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿联酋BESS消防安全具有场址特定性。应规划民防安装审查和消防安全证据包，而不是仅依赖电池、IEC、GB或合格证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿聯酋BESS消防安全具有場址特定性。應規劃民防安裝審查和消防安全證據包，而不是僅依賴電池、IEC、GB或合格證書。
